MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.

Off Calendar Apr-14-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Plaintiff SALMA KHAN, Tel No. (415) 742-6444 present in pro per;
Atty. MELISSA HOLMES of Howard Rome Martin & Ridley LLP, Tel No. (650) 980-1038 appearing for Defendants County of San Mateo and Celia Moreno, M.D.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling (with the sole modification of deleting the $60.00 award of costs to Defendants as Defendants were exempt from that cost). As to DEFENDANTS COUNTY OF SAN MATEO AND CELIA MORENO, M.D.'S Fourth Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Supplemental Responses To Form Interrogatories And Demand For Production Of Documents, And For Sanctions, the code requires that plaintiff make a reasonable and good faith effort to obtain the information to answer discovery. Regency Health Services, Inc. v. Superior Court (1998) 64 CA4th1496 "A party cannot plead ignorance to information which can be obtained from sources under [her] control." Plaintiff must also make a "diligent search" and a "reasonable inquiry" in responding to a document request. C.C.P. 2031.230 Plaintiff has had two years to properly respond to the discovery. Yet, despite the numerous opportunities to respond, she has violated three separate orders. Therefore, defendant's motion for terminating sanctions is granted. Defendant's request for monetary sanctions is granted. Plaintiff to pay defendant County of San Mateo, Celia Moreno, M.D. and their attorneys of record Howard, Rome, Martin & Ridley $1,600.00 no later than May 1, 2015. ORDER AFTER HEARING AND ORDER DISMISSING COMPLAINT BOTH SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported.
